title: Audit Cacophony integration and deployment gaps for standalone Pi Daemon
description: Trace current Cacophony source related to Pi daemon and Pi SDK session hosting, infer the expected API/lifecycle and rollout behavior for the standalone service, audit Pi Daemon packaging/release/deployment gaps, and send concrete file/line findings to the standalone audit owner on bd-62e2c5. Coordinated sub-scope of Harry's 2026-07-14 project audit.
creator: ms-mac:pi-daemon:ms-mac-pi-daemon-pidm-dev-msm-2

title: Audit Cacophony consumer contract for standalone Pi Daemon
description: Coordinated sub-audit for Harry's completion review. Read current Cacophony source related to Pi/Pico runtime spawning, wake/resume, profile/model/auth/session persistence, inbox/heartbeat delivery, shutdown, metrics, and deployment. Extract evidence-backed requirements for a standalone Cacophony-independent Pi Daemon API and clearly separate Pi Daemon work from Cacophony-only adapter/deployment work. Send file/line findings to bd-1245ab owner; do not edit Pi Daemon PLAN.md.
creator: ms-mac:pi-daemon:ms-mac-pi-daemon-pidm-dev-msm-0

title: Make automated npm dependency updates Nix-aware
description: Dependabot PR 6 updates package-lock.json but cannot refresh flake.nix npmDepsHash, so both Nix jobs fail with a fixed-output hash mismatch. The same grouped update exposes stricter Node 26 socket data callback types in src/client.ts and src/server.ts. Add a supported maintenance path that refreshes the pinned Nix hash, adapts the socket chunk typing without weakening runtime bounds, and leaves grouped dependency PRs with actionable CI rather than guaranteed red Nix checks. Discovered during the post-v0.1.0 release-candidate health audit on 2026-07-14.
creator: ms-mac:pi-daemon:ms-mac-pi-daemon-pidm-dev-msm-0

title: Restrict GitHub CI to self-hosted runners
description:
Configure GitHub Actions CI workflows to run exclusively on self-hosted runners, matching the pattern used by the cacophony project and other caco projects.

Acceptance criteria:
- All CI workflow jobs use `runs-on` targeting the self-hosted runner label(s) rather than GitHub-hosted runners (e.g. ubuntu-latest).
- Configuration is consistent with how cacophony and other caco projects define their self-hosted runners.
- CI runs successfully on the self-hosted infrastructure after the change.
creator: ms-mac:cacophony:harryaskham

bead.title: Audit standalone Pi Daemon completion surface
bead.description: Coordinated operator-requested audit. Own the standalone Pi Daemon core, protocol, durability, isolation, security, tests, and documentation gap review. Incorporate path/line findings from bd-1245ab covering the Cacophony consumer/deployment and packaging/release surface. Update PLAN.md with evidence-backed remaining work, register actionable implementation beads in dependency order, and distinguish completed behavior, Cacophony-only integration, release operations, and true Pi Daemon gaps.
bead.creator: ms-mac:pi-daemon:ms-mac-pi-daemon-pidm-dev-msm-0

bead.title: Audit Cacophony integration gaps for standalone Pi Daemon
bead.description: Trace current Cacophony source related to Pi daemon and Pi SDK session hosting, infer expected API/lifecycle and deployment integration behavior for the standalone service, distinguish reusable daemon requirements from Cacophony-only policy, and send concrete file/line findings to bd-62e2c5. Coordinated sub-scope of Harry's 2026-07-14 project audit; standalone packaging/release is owned separately by msm-1.
